headline: DexCom Reports Positive CONNECT Data for Non-Insulin Diabetes
summary: DXCM reports positive CONNECT trial results as Dexcom G7 improves HbA1c and time in range in adults with Type 2 diabetes not using insulin.

raw.headline: DexCom Reports Positive CONNECT Data for Non-Insulin Diabetes
raw.summary: DXCM reports positive CONNECT trial results as Dexcom G7 improves HbA1c and time in range in adults with Type 2 diabetes not using insulin.

headline: Clinical Wins Boost Dexcom Growth Story In Type 2 Diabetes
summary: DexCom CONNECT trial found G7 reduced A1C and improved glucose control in Type 2 diabetes patients not using insulin.

raw.headline: Clinical Wins Boost Dexcom Growth Story In Type 2 Diabetes
raw.summary: DexCom CONNECT trial found G7 reduced A1C and improved glucose control in Type 2 diabetes patients not using insulin.

headline: DexCom Inc (NASDAQ:DXCM) Passes Rigorous Quality Screen with Strong Profitability and Growth Metrics
summary: DexCom (DXCM) excels in quality investing metrics with 11.89% revenue CAGR, 47.12% ROIC, and minimal debt. Strong fundamentals and cash flow make it a standout in diabetes care.

headline: Inspire Medical: Golden Opportunity To Monetize A Fundamentally Mispriced Selloff
summary: Inspire Medical Systems faces a sharp revenue slowdown due to temporary CPT coding and CMS Project WISeR disruptions. See why I rate INSP stock a Buy.
